title: rittera calcitrapae
intro: Rittera calcitrapae, also known as the calcitrapa, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Nasturtium family. The medicinal properties of Rittera calcitrapae include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Rittera calcitrapae typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and other health conditions.
